title: The Wind Makes It Too Hard to Hear
overview: Two old friends go to spy on a new table tennis champ at a rival high school, but meanwhile their own team is falling apart.

title: Smile Is a Robot
overview: Coach Koizumi has started working Smile hard, and he definitely doesn't appreciate the extra attention.

title: Staking Your Life on Table Tennis Is Revolting
overview: All the teams gather at the prefectural qualifiers, and China gets to play Smile at last.

title: The Only Way to Be Sure You Won't Lose Is to Not Fight
overview: Peco learns a hard lesson from someone he never took seriously enough, and then we finally see how Dragon earned his name.

title: Where Did I Go Wrong?
overview: Dragon's obsession with Smile prompts Akuma to do something rash.

title: You Love This Sport More Than Anyone!!
overview: Five athletes have five very different Christmas Eves, and Peco gets a wake-up call.

title: Yes, My Coach
overview: Players, coaches, captains, and their families.

title: The Hero Appears
overview: Smile, Peco, Dragon, and China begin another prefectural qualifier. Will the results be different this year?

title: Gonna Cry a Bit
overview: In the third round, Dragon has an unexpected visitor, Sanada questions himself, and Peco scares lots of people in lots of ways.

title: I Thought You Were the Hero!!
overview: Peco and Dragon tackle the question of whether only birds can fly.
